_comment: Common contract/clause nouns that appear in legal prose between a sentence-verb and the company name (e.g. 'Vendor signed Agreement with Acme Inc.'). The legal-form trim skips these when scanning forward for the org's first Cap word, so the anchor lands on the real company name rather than the contract noun. Lowercased; matched case-insensitively. Organised per-language; at runtime the legal-form detector unions every language's list into a single set because match spans don't carry a language tag.
